title: Schoenoplectiella hooperae
taxonomy: Schoenoplectiella hooperae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This species is part of the genus Schoenoplectiella, which is a group of grass-like plants. The classification of Schoenoplectiella hooperae is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, and order Poales. It is a relatively recently discovered species, and further research is needed to fully understand its classification and characteristics. Schoenoplectiella hooperae is native to Australia, where it is found in certain wetland environments.
uses: Schoenoplectiella hooperae has been reported to have various medicinal uses.
